Feb 19 · Thursday · Day 1

Arrival & soft landing

~50°F / 10°CEasy dayBeat jet lag
1
AfternoonLand & clear customs

Arrive in Tokyo

Touch down, clear immigration, grab cash and a Suica/Pasmo IC card, pick up a pocket Wi-Fi/SIM. From Narita: the N'EX (to Tokyo/Shinjuku) or Keisei Skyliner (to Ueno) get you in fast. Go slow - you've been flying all day.

Get Suica cardNarita (NRT)~60 min N'EX to city
Open in Maps
🚂N'EX or Skyliner into Tokyo (~60 min, ~¥3,000); final leg set once hotel is picked
2
Late afternoon~4:00 PM

Check in & drop bagsEasy day

Check in, drop the bags, freshen up. Resist the nap if you can - a short reset is fine, but stay up to beat the jet lag.

Hotel TBDShort rest only
Open in Maps
🚂Gentle stroll near the hotel
3
Evening5:30 - 7:00 PM

Gentle neighborhood stroll

A relaxed walk to shake off the flight - neon, side streets, vending machines, first views. No agenda, just soak it in.

Easy walkFirst neonStay close
Open in Maps
🚂To the nearest convenience store
4
Night7:30 PM

Conbini dinner & sleep

Round one at a 7-Eleven / Lawson / FamilyMart: egg sando, onigiri, hot oden, a cold drink. Cheap, delicious, perfect. Then sleep early - big day tomorrow.

~¥1,000 (~$7)Try the egg sandoEarly night
